# tfe_agent_token

This ephemeral resource can be used to retrieve an agent token without saving its value in state.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_pool_id` (String) ID of the agent. If omitted, agent must be defined in the provider config.
- `description` (String) Description of the agent token.

### Read-Only

- `token` (String, Sensitive) The generated token.
